user.title: Xthings Cloud Login
user.description: Please enter your Xthings Cloud account credentials.

data_description.email: The email address used to register your Xthings Cloud account.

2fa_email.title: Email Verification
2fa_email.description: A 6-digit verification code has been sent to {email}. Please enter the code.

data_description.verification_code: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email.

2fa_phone.title: Phone Verification
2fa_phone.description: A 6-digit verification code has been sent to your phone. Please enter the code.

data_description.verification_code: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your phone.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Xthings Cloud
reauth_confirm.description: Your session has expired. Please re-enter your credentials.

reauth_2fa_email.title: Email Verification
reauth_2fa_email.description: A 6-digit verification code has been sent to {email}. Please enter the code.

reauth_2fa_phone.title: Phone Verification
reauth_2fa_phone.description: A 6-digit verification code has been sent to your phone. Please enter the code.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Xthings Cloud.
error.user_not_logged_in: Session expired, please log in again.
error.user_not_activated: This account has not been activated.
error.token_invalid: Invalid token, please log in again.
error.token_expired: Token expired, please log in again.
error.invalid_verification_code: Invalid verification code, please try again.
